notifications.description: We detected a suspicious login attempt on your account. Please review your recent transactions.

notifications.title: ✅ Transaction Confirmation
notifications.description: Your recent transfer of $500 to John Doe was successful.

notifications.title: ℹ️ Important Announcement

notifications.title: 💰 Loan Payment Reminder
notifications.description: Your loan installment for this month is due on Feb 25, 2024. Ensure sufficient funds are available.

notifications.title: 🔐 Account Security Update
notifications.description: We've enhanced our security measures. Please update your password for better protection.

notifications.title: 🛠️ Scheduled Maintenance
notifications.description: Our banking system will undergo scheduled maintenance on Feb 22, 2024, from 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM (UTC).

notifications.title: 🚀 New Feature Announcement
notifications.description: Introducing Quick Transfer! Send money to your contacts instantly with our latest feature.
